arts.ttl: Liverpool's Slot admits trying to influence ref calls
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has admitted that he has tried to influence referees in games this season, adding that his attempts have not worked.

arts.ttl: €60m offer prepared: Liverpool rival Arsenal for 23-year-old with 15 G/A already this season
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly preparing to try making a €60million bid for the transfer of Atalanta playmaker Charles De Ketelaere. The talented Belgium international has been on fire this season, contributing a hugely impressive six goals and nine assists in all competitions so far this term. arts.ttl: 20 G/A this season: Liverpool & Arsenal seriously interested in world class attacker transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are reportedly both showing a strong interest in the potential transfer of Atalanta star Ademola Lookman following his superb form. arts.ttl: Why Liverpool boss Arne Slot isn't on the touchline for Southampton clash
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be watching Liverpool's trip to Southampton from the stands at St Mary's Stadium, as his Reds side aim to reach the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's preference to replace Trent Alexander-Arnold at Liverpool 'revealed'
arts.sum: A report reveals Arne Slot's preference when it comes to replacing Trent Alexander-Arnold at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Slot: “Southampton game an opportunity for Federico Chiesa”
arts.sum: As Liverpool prepare for their upcoming EFL Cup match against Southampton, all eyes are on Federico Chiesa, who is set to make his long-awaited return to action after an extended absence due to injury and illness. arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister drops early Liverpool team news hint after Arne Slot cryptic message
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister is back in contention for the first time after serving a ban across two competitions as Liverpool take on Southampton in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: I know supporters weren't happy with my Liverpool transfer - I now want to repair those wounds
arts.sum: Adam Lallana could return from injury for Southampton against former club Liverpool on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Liverpool injuries: Every player out of Carabao Cup quarter-final against Southampton
arts.sum: Slot is expected to make changes to his starting lineup on Wednesday but here are those he won't be able to call upon due to injuries and suspensions. Kostas Tsimikas has missed recent outings due to an ankle injury he picked up in training.
